entities.name: Upper Body Focus #2
entities.context: Day 4 workout session in V's training program

entities.name: Pull-ups
entities.context: Back exercise, 3x6-8 reps, with lat pulldown or wide overhand variant

entities.name: Lat Pulldowns
entities.context: Gym-based back exercise alternative to pull-ups

entities.name: Face Pulls
entities.context: Rear delt/upper back exercise alternative to seated cable row

entities.name: Farmers Carries
entities.context: Grip and core exercise, 30 seconds per arm

entities.name: Koran Walks
entities.context: Optional carry variation added to farmers carries

entities.name: TRX Rows
entities.context: Suspension trainer back exercise, 3 sets to failure

entities.name: Shoulder Complex
entities.context: Compound set: lateral raises, front raises, upright rows, 2x10 each

entities.name: Strength Circuit
entities.context: Training methodology: exercises performed as circuit for 1-3 rounds

entities.name: Conditioning
entities.context: 12-15 minutes moderate cardio following strength work

relationships.context: Day 4 structured as a circuit-based strength session
Interchangeable exercise alternatives for back training
Interchangeable exercise alternatives for chest training

Multi-movement shoulder block within the upper body session
